articles.title: Akhilesh Yadav calls for women's reservation in Parliament only after fresh census
articles.description: Akhilesh Yadav said any policy must rest on accurate data, arguing that the women's reservation framework is flawed if it relies on outdated population figures of the 2011 Census

articles.title: EPS did not keep his promise on Rajya Sabha seat to DMDK: Premalatha
articles.description: Palaniswami claimed that he had not entered into any pact with DMDK on Rajya Sabha seat during Parliamentary polls in 2024 nor had he given any assurance to Ms. Premalatha during talks for Lok Sabha polls that year

articles.title: Search operations stepped up to trace missing Kerala woman trekker in Tadiandamol in Kodagu
articles.description: Rescue efforts are bolstered by local volunteers and advanced technology as authorities focus on locating G. Sharanya, who vanished during a guided trek in the Tadiandamol hills

articles.title: Footage shows IDF military dog attacking Palestinian man inside mosque
articles.description: CCTV footage circulated online shows the moment that an Israeli military dog attacks a worshipper leaving a mosque

articles.title: Nellore MP allays fears among fishermen on Juvvaladinne project
Ukraine hits port in Russia’s Primorsk, oil refinery in Nizhny Novgorod
articles.description: Fuel leaks at Primorsk, and ⁠NORSI oil refinery catches fire, Russian authorities say.

articles.title: Tripura ADC poll: BJP promises recognition to Kokborok, indigenous languages
articles.description: The BJP’s manifesto promises to rename TTAADC from Tripura Tribal Areas Autonomous District Council to Tripura Autonomous Territorial Council

topStories.title: US Rescues Missing Airman as Iran Strikes Persian Gulf States
topStories.description: US forces rescued an airman from Iran after his fighter jet was shot down, while the Islamic Republic’s continued attacks sparked fires that damaged Kuwait’s oil headquarters and shut down an Emirati petrochemicals plant.

topStories.title: Unlike BJP, Congress works to unify people and spread love: Rahul Gandhi
topStories.description: Rahul Gandhi accuses BJP and CM Sarma of corruption and spreading hatred, pledges Congress will unify Assam and deliver development.

topStories.title: Thousands rally in Iraq against ‘senseless’ US-Israel war on Iran
topStories.description: Protesters chant against the US and Israel, urging the global community to confront their actions in the Middle East.

topStories.title: Trump seeks to end the war without it becoming ‘an abject failure’
topStories.description: Barbara Slavin of the Stimson Center says Trump misread the situation in Iran and now scrambles for a way out.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 37 of US-Israeli attacks?
topStories.description: A US crew member who has been missing since Iran shot down a fighter jet has been rescued, President Donald Trump says.

topStories.title: PM’s push for increasing seats of Lok Sabha, assemblies nothing but ‘Weapon of Mass Distraction’: Congress
topStories.description: Congress’ remarks come a day after PM Modi said that Parliament’s Budget session has been extended for three days so that the law enacted in 2023 for providing 33% reservation to women in the Lok Sabha and State Assemblies can be implemented from 2029

topStories.title: Trump's taandav shakes global trust. Not just in him but in US that elects him twice

topStories.title: After Bondi exit, Trump weighs major Cabinet shake up; who are on the chopping block?
topStories.description: Donald Trump is contemplating a cabinet shake-up following Pam Bondi's removal amid frustrations over the Iran conflict and its impact on his approval ratings.

topStories.title: What we know so far about rescue of US airman in Iran
topStories.description: The US has rescued the missing crew member of the US F-15 fighter jet which was shot down over southern Iran.

topStories.title: ‘Miraculous’: US rescues second pilot downed in Iran, Trump confirms
topStories.description: Iran claims another US aircraft involved in the rescue of the F-15 fighter pilot has been shot down.

topStories.title: US-Iran dramatic firefight as Israel ally searches for missing pilot in Isfahan | Watch viral video
topStories.description: A viral video captured a dramatic firefight between US and Iranian forces. This comes in the wake of US-led search operation to find an F-15 pilot sheltering in Isfahan amidst the West Asia conflict.

topStories.title: Modi government not listening to anyone: Rahul flags functional problems of OSCs for women
topStories.description: What was the government's response? That everything is 'satisfactory'. If everything is indeed 'satisfactory', then why are reports of so many problems regarding OSCs continuing to surface? questions Congress leader Rahul Gandhi

dailyNews.description: Most Americans oppose the US-Israel war on Iran. ​​No recent US war has ever started off being this unpopular.

dailyNews.description: A near-death experience during a duck hunting trip across the bay from New Orleans leads a stubborn skeptic to faith, love and a second chance at life.

dailyNews.title: Man who put up $100K to find Nancy Guthrie says tipsters should skip the sheriff and call Crime Stoppers
dailyNews.description: Crime Stoppers is offering a $102,500 reward for anonymous tips in the case of Nancy Guthrie, who was allegedly taken from her Tucson home in February.

dailyNews.title: American Culture Quiz: Test yourself on Tidal Basin traditions and baseball benchmarks
dailyNews.description: The American Culture Quiz is a weekly test of our national traits, trends, history and people. This time, test your knowledge of Tidal Basin traditions, baseball benchmarks and more.

dailyNews.title: Artemis II astronauts face toilet trouble as they head toward the moon
dailyNews.description: The Artemis II crew is experiencing a recurring toilet malfunction on the Orion spacecraft due to a suspected ice blockage during their 10-day trip to orbit the moon.

dailyNews.title: Michigan routs Arizona to advance to men's national championship, will take on UConn
dailyNews.description: The Michigan Wolverines routed the Arizona Wildcats 91-73 in the Final Four, earning their first national championship game appearance since 2018.

dailyNews.title: DHS slams Democrat Sen Chris Van Hollen claim, says illegal alien caused crash while fleeing ICE

dailyNews.title: Trump demands Iran reopen Strait of Hormuz as missing U.S. airman rescued
dailyNews.description: A senior Iranian military official rejected President Trump's ultimatum, calling it "a helpless, nervous, unbalanced and stupid action."

dailyNews.title: Missing U.S. crew member from downed fighter jet rescued in Iran, Trump says
dailyNews.description: A U.S. crew member who went missing when an F-15E fighter jet was shot down over a remote area of Iran has been rescued by U.S. forces.

dailyNews.title: Second U.S. crew member from downed jet rescued from Iran | Special Report
dailyNews.description: The second U.S. crew member from the downed F-15E in Iran was rescued by special forces, according to multiple U.S. officials and President Trump. Carissa Lawson anchors this Special Report.

dailyNews.title: Trump gives Iran 48-hour deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz or "Hell will reign down"
dailyNews.description: The war shows no signs of slowing as Iran responds to airstrikes with attacks across the region.

dailyNews.title: How Trump's change to H-1B visas is impacting workers with aspirations to come to the U.S.
dailyNews.description: For decades, the U.S. has imported highly-skilled tech workers from around the world on H-1B visas. But the Trump administration changed the way they are granted. Shanelle Kaul reports on how that is impacting the pipeline of global talent coming to America.

dailyNews.title: Trump confirms both military officers missing in Iran have been rescued
dailyNews.description: Trump says the officers were rescued "deep in Enemy Territory" in mountainous terrain.

dailyNews.description: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

dailyNews.title: Trump tariff fallout: Some industries grapple with lingering effects one year later

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
